zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ogle於1405年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可利時，她的父親Robert Ogle26歲，母親Margaret Grey24歲。她於從1424年6月14日到1424年8月20日與Sir Robert Harbottle結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1443年11月14日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德霍頓享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ogle于1405年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可利时，她的父亲Robert Ogle26岁，母亲Margaret Grey24岁。她于从1424年6月14日到1424年8月20日与Sir Robert Harbottle结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1443年11月14日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德霍頓享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ogle was born in 1405, in Kirkley, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Ogle, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Grey, was 24. She married Sir Robert Harbottle from 14 June 1424 to 20 August 1424. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 14 November 1443, in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ogle est née en 1405, à Kirkley, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ogle, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Harbottle du 14 juin 1424 au 20 août 1424. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1443, à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Ogleが1405年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクリーで生まれた時，父Robert Ogleは26歳，母Margaret Greyは24歳であった。から1424年6月14日まで1424年8月20日にSir Robert Harbottleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1443年11月14日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ogle(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ogle(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1424년 6월 14일부터 1424년 8월 20일까지 Sir Robert Harbottle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.
